narration: Fibonacci starts from the two base cases, 0 and 1.
callout: These first two answers let the whole sequence begin.

narration: Each new position adds the previous two saved answers.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Which two earlier Fibonacci values help make F(6)?

choices.label: F(5) and F(4)
choices.feedback: Correct. Each Fibonacci value uses the two before it.

choices.label: Only F(5)
choices.feedback: Not this one. Fibonacci needs the previous two answers.

narration: Because each answer is saved, the later positions can reuse them quickly.
callout: That is the DP win: no repeated recomputing.
